memory.summary: My study plan is suddenly compromised by a high-value social invite from my close friend group, forcing an immediate renegotiation of priorities.
The deadline shift to 14:30 invalidates my old plan, forcing an immediate renegotiation with the cohort before I lose focus on the high-value social invite.
My study progress stalled while the cohort gathered for their high-priority social event, forcing an immediate renegotiation of my academic timeline.

I've set a hard deadline for the analysis, cutting through social noise to protect my high-priority outcome despite low energy.
I missed the deadline despite making progress; I must renegotiate the timeline immediately to protect this high-value outcome.
I secured the analysis milestone but failed the reading deadline, forcing me to renegotiate timelines immediately to protect this high-value outcome despite my low energy.
My cohort_3 message confirms I failed the reading deadline again, proving my hard stops are ineffective when social pressure resurfaces despite my best efforts.

desires: Renegotiate the reading deadline immediately to protect the analysis milestone's high-value outcome without further social friction.
Establish a hard stop mechanism that is actually enforceable against social pressure, specifically within the cohort_3 group.
Prioritize sleep discipline tonight to prevent burnout before tomorrow's course block, despite the guilt of missing the reading.

goals.description: Send a direct text to cohort_3 explicitly stating that the Mon 20:00 reading deadline is non-negotiable and demanding an alternative submission window or extension, citing my need to protect my academic record.
goals.rationale: The visible observation that 'nothing changed' when I let the moment pass confirms my previous strategy of passive negotiation failed. My value system prioritizes academic success above social harmony; allowing another soft deadline failure compounds the risk of public precedent setting. Since my assertiveness style dictates I do not accept ambiguity, I must enforce this boundary immediately via text to secure my long-term planning horizon by preventing further group friction from derailing my focus on the high-value analysis section.

goals.description: Complete the final 7% of the Course assignment analysis section immediately after sending the message, utilizing remaining energy before sleep debt becomes critical.
goals.rationale: With the previous hard deadline already missed and no change in outcome yet, continuing to burn out on low-yield tasks like the reading assignment is inefficient. My focus capacity is currently maxed out on high-value output (the analysis section). Prioritizing the completion of the near-finished task ensures I don't waste cognitive resources on something that no longer carries the same weight as the failed one. I will defer this until the negotiation is settled so I can approach the writing with renewed clarity rather than reactive stress.

goals.description: Immediately enter a deep rest cycle for 4 hours starting at 00:00 to recover sleep debt before resuming any work tomorrow morning.
goals.rationale: While recovering sleep debt is important for long-term execution, it is secondary to securing the academic boundary today. Once the renegotiation is sent and the analysis section is finished, I will shift focus to recovery to prevent physical stamina from compounding stress levels. This goal is active because without adequate rest, my ability to enforce boundaries and perform high-level work tomorrow will degrade, undermining my entire plan.

goals.description: Propose a revised, concrete timeline for the assignment analysis to teammate_A via text, explicitly acknowledging the previous plan's failure and setting a new deadline by 14:30.
goals.rationale: My assertive nature demands direct boundary-setting; I cannot let the compromised plan linger. Protecting my academic output (academic value) requires immediate communication with teammate_A before lunch, even if it feels slightly awkward.

goals.rationale: While social connection is important, my long planning horizon and focus on future payoff mean I must secure a slot that guarantees completion of the reading by 20:00. I will accept the invitation to maintain closeness but renegotiate the timing directly to protect my goals.
